textByHash.025315e7058ce227ce03d4b1865ef266a4f898c3: Well, because I was in charge of looking after Sandstorm, I was able to look at the inner workings.
textByHash.02d9f4cc0d980bc212697f58f4faed8e2adc3988: Hey there, what can I do for ya?
textByHash.12c0e47ebd916b97ea9adb121bae388ba2e1566c: I have of your buckets and you've ground enough sandstone for buckets of sand.
textByHash.16b7148294e808336a4b582c0ac3fe4a5c75c82b: Me and Sandstorm go way back, we started off back in the desert mining camp, I was a slave and I had the honour of looking after Sandstorm.
textByHash.26c5ccbba219d6c859fbaab41404ff24fe316f72: Ya don't have any buckets of sand to withdraw. Ya need to give me empty buckets, and grind sandstone in my grinder, then I'll sell ya buckets of sand.
textByHash.3a18a4de8d706b7091817b16da0b4c7f1c9aa3f2: My name is Drew and I man this here grinding machine. I call her Sandstorm!
textByHash.4b554c62017e8cf104c9a629edcd1b5f4024d8e1: I can also look after any buckets ya want me to.
textByHash.4de80b1f7a4490194d25ab5dc14ee28d38716032: Anyway, that's all in the past. Can I help ya with anything else?
textByHash.6b155d1a3527b941b3f68669c72a32d91bc30163: So, he didn't bother to check his cargo and I was able to board as he was driving off.
textByHash.a41a2c3a1fa71a6cd1e698630dfe57656cdfdabb: While the guards weren't looking, I would take apart Sandstorm piece by piece and place the pieces in boxes and barrels, when Sandstorms inners were all gutted, I tricked the cart driver by telling him cart jokes.
textByHash.a56c125f49a6f4ef168123906a38633f39e3e56e: You haven't got any buckets for me to hold.
